hook: She wrote her first novel before her kids woke up.
body: A divorced single mother of two, working full time as an editor, she wrote in the quiet early mornings. Her first novel came out when she was 39.
copy_today: Find one quiet 20-minute window that already exists in your day. Give it to what matters, not the phone.
receipt: The Bluest Eye (Holt, Rinehart & Winston, 1970). Morrison born 1931, age 39 at publication.
caption:
She wrote her first novel before her kids woke up.

Toni Morrison was a divorced single mother of two, working full time as an editor. She wrote in the quiet early mornings, and her first novel came out when she was 39.

Copy this today: find one quiet 20-minute window that already exists in your day, and give it to what matters.

Receipt: The Bluest Eye, 1970 - confirmed across Britannica, the Howard University archive, and the National Women's History Museum.

Real people. Real proof.
#thehardwin #tonimorrison #latebloomer #writing #realpeoplerealproof
_notes: TEMPLATE. Every field except image_credit is required. 'sources' must list 2+ independent reputable sources that confirm the receipt; if two cannot be found, do not ship the card.
